desired_outcome: sidepanel renders canonical results rather than redefining runtime behavior

explicit_local_command_invocation.reason: browser-to-command invocation can create hidden execution or environment coupling unless separately gated

explicit_local_file_handoff.reason: preserves user mediation and avoids endpoints, background listeners, and command invocation

explicit_localhost_call.reason: requires separate ingress contract and implementation gate because listeners can feel like hidden runtime behavior

python_generated_result_artifact_importe.reason: canonical Python runtime creates deterministic result artifact and sidepanel renders it read-only

required_guarantees: canonical Python runtime remains source of truth
replay remains session-visible unless separately upgraded
operator-visible non-authority labels remain attached to governed return
risks: file import adds an operator step and may feel less live than direct invocation
result artifact integrity will need deterministic hash or schema validation
operators may confuse canonical result import with approval
later localhost bridge could reintroduce hidden-runtime perception if not separately reviewed
next_implementation_scope: sidepanel rendering of canonical lifecycle result
